author: lOrm
content: Fixed: extracted memory::xml_escape_for_prompt(&str) -> Cow<str> helper (allocation-free for benign content) and applied it to all 4 prompt-injection sinks: format_core_memory_for_prompt (section name + content), format_recent_context_for_prompt (summary + file paths + issue refs + ended_at), format_file_knowledge (path attribute + pattern_type + description + error_signature + resolution + related file names), and compaction::ContextCompactor::generate_summary (message text in both Text and Parts branches, plus session_id defence-in-depth). 11 new fix692_* tests cover closing-tag injection across all 4 sinks plus benign-content regression guards. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore]. cargo clippy clean; 1428 tests pass.
